items.author: Yahoo Sports

items.title: The Denver Nuggets signed Trevon Brazile to a 4-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes the first two seasons fully guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Brazile was the 35th pick of the 2026 NBA Draft out of Arkansas. He was acquired in a trade with the San Antonio Spurs.
items.author: Michael Scotto

items.title: In December 2022, Trevon Brazile tore his ACL. He's with Denver Nuggets now, where he will compete with power forward DaRon Holmes II, a 2024 first round pick who is still trying to bounce back from an Achilles tear in his rookie summer league
items.author: Law Murray 📘
